trivia_bullets.text: Foundations (November 15, 2024) is designed as an evergreen core-set replacement: approximately 50% reprints and 50% new cards, intended to give new players a stable entry point. Mark Rosewater described it as functioning 'similarly to an evergreen Core set.' [Wizards.com: 'Starting with a Good Foundations, Part 1' — WebSearch snippet; Draftsim Foundations overview]
sources: magic.wizards.com 'Starting with a Good Foundations Part 1' (WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Fiery Annihilation is a new card (not a reprint) in Foundations, illustrated by Warren Mahy — a New Zealand artist who joined Weta Workshop circa 1999 to work on Peter Jackson's Lord of the Rings trilogy as a concept designer before transitioning to MTG illustration via Wizards of the Coast contacts. He has illustrated over 245 Magic cards. [Wikipedia: Warren Mahy; WebSearch snippet]

Fiery Annihilation was previewed on October 28, 2024, by ChannelFireball as part of Foundations spoiler season, and is included in the Foundations Beginner Box 'Inferno' deck — a mono-red Dragon-themed introductory product designed to teach new players how mono-red aggro works. [Scryfall preview data; magic.wizards.com: Foundations Beginner Box Contents; MMORPG.com exclusive Inferno deck reveal]
sources: magic.wizards.com: Foundations Beginner Box Contents (WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "'Fireproof or your money back!' —Jornald's Arms and Armor (out of business)" The joke trades on the obvious: armor described as fireproof met a dragon. The parenthetical '(out of business)' is the punchline. No lore figure named Jornald appears elsewhere in Scryfall's MTG corpus; the name exists only to carry the gag. [Scryfall]

Standard-, Pioneer-, Modern-, and Commander-legal as of release. The oracle text — 5 damage plus the ability to exile an attached Equipment and exile the creature on death — combines removal and graveyard-hate in a single card slot, an unusually dense interaction suite for a 3-mana instant. EDHREC rank of 11955 reflects moderate Commander adoption. [Scryfall legalities; Scryfall EDHREC rank]

related_cards.name: Lightning Bolt
related_cards.note: Core damage spell also in Foundations; comparison point for Fiery Annihilation's higher-cost deeper effect

related_cards.name: Shatter
related_cards.note: Equipment exile on Fiery Annihilation echoes artifact-removal spells like Shatter

related_cards.name: Dragonlord's Servant
related_cards.note: Also in the Inferno Beginner Box deck alongside Fiery Annihilation
